description: Yoti provides identity and age assurance products, including document and biometric verification, facial age estimation, digital ID, trust and safety tooling, and eSignatures. Its products are used by businesses to verify users, assess age, and support related compliance and fraud-prevention workflows.
summary: Yoti exposes multiple public HTTP APIs for identity verification, age verification, facial age estimation, trust/safety, and proof-of-age verification; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found in public docs.
